title: heterotis amplexicaulis
intro: Heterotis amplexicaulis, also known as the 'False Flacourtia', is a plant species in the family Passifloraceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Heterotis amplexicaulis include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce swelling, and treat various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are applied topically to the affected area or consumed as a tea to reap its medicinal benefits.
